body.title: CLOSED: Provision agent-datacenter-0001 Postgres DB + datacenter role + schema
body.result: agent-datacenter-0001 created: datacenter role + memory_palace + memories tables. Verified via psql connection.
body.description:
agent_datacenter needs its own Postgres database (agent-datacenter-0001) within the same Postgres instance as Igor (127.0.0.1:5432), with a separate `datacenter` role and password. No Igor dependency for any datacenter operation. Decision D-datacenter-own-db-2026-05-05.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/scripts/provision_dc_db.sql (new), agent_datacenter/.env.example (new or update), lab/design_docs/decisions/D-datacenter-own-db-2026-05-05.md
**Design rules:** no-sqlite, separate-credentials
**Scope boundary:** IN: create DB, create role, grant permissions, create memory_palace table (path TEXT PK, title TEXT, content TEXT, node_type TEXT, metadata JSONB, tags TEXT[]). OUT: populating the palace, wiring app code (T-adc-db-proxy-wire).
**Test plan:** psql as datacenter user to agent-datacenter-0001; verify memory_palace table exists; verify Igor credentials cannot connect.
**Pass condition:** `psql postgresql://datacenter:<pass>@127.0.0.1/agent-datacenter-0001 -c '\dt'` shows memory_palace; Igor's IGOR_HOME_DB_URL credentials rejected.
